title: Alberta Communities Social Studies Assignment
subject: social_studies
raw_text:
Alberta Communities Project

Choose one community in Alberta. Research and write a short report (3-4 paragraphs) that answers:
1. Where is this community located?
2. What makes this community special?
3. How do people in this community help each other?

Include at least one map or drawing. Present your report to the class next Thursday.
teacher_goal: Need EAL-supported version with visual scaffolds, chunked version for students who struggle with multi-paragraph writing, and extension version for strong writers.
